name: Facebook Conversions Api Web
description: Send events to Facebook Conversions API from the browser.

pixelId.description: The Pixel ID associated with your Facebook Pixel.
pixelId.label: Pixel ID

disablePushState.description: If set to true, prevents Facebook Pixel from sending PageView events on history state changes. Set to true if you want to trigger PageView events manually via the pageView Action.
disablePushState.label: Disable Push State

disableAutoConfig.description: Control whether Facebook’s Meta Pixel automatically collects additional page and button data to optimize ads and measurement. When this toggle is on, Auto Config is disabled and only basic pixel tracking will occur. Turning it off enables Auto Config, allowing the Pixel to automatically send page metadata and button interactions to improve ad delivery and reporting.
disableAutoConfig.label: Disable Auto Config

disableFirstPartyCookies.description: Control whether Facebook’s Meta Pixel uses first-party cookies. When this toggle is on, first-party cookies are disabled, enhancing user privacy. Turning it off enables the use of first-party cookies for more accurate tracking.
disableFirstPartyCookies.label: Disable First Party Cookies

agent.description: Specifies the agent to use when sending events.
agent.label: Agent

ldu.description: Specify if and how Limited Data Use should apply.
ldu.label: Limited Data User (LDU)

options.label: LDU enabled - Use Meta Geolocation Logic
options.text: LDU enabled - Use Meta Geolocation Logic

formatUserDataWithParamBuilder.description: If enabled, uses Facebook’s Parameter Builder library to help ensure that User Data values are properly formatted before being sent to Facebook.
formatUserDataWithParamBuilder.label: Format User Data with Parameter Builder

actions.name: Send Event
actions.description: Send a Standard or Custom Event to Facebook Conversions API.

fields.label: Event Configuration
fields.description: Specify the type of Facebook Conversions API event to send.

event_config.title: Event Configuration
event_config.description: Specify the type of Facebook Conversions API event to send.

event_name.title: Event Name
event_name.description: Facebook Conversions API Event Name to send. Select 'Custom Event' to send a non standard event.

custom_event_name.title: Custom Event Name
custom_event_name.description: Custom event name to send to Facebook

show_fields.title: Show all fields
show_fields.description: Show all fields, even those which are not relevant to the selected Event Name.

fields.label: Content Category
fields.description: The category of the content associated with the event.

content_category.title: Content Category
content_category.description: The category of the content associated with the event.

fields.label: Content IDs
fields.description: Product IDs associated with the event, such as SKUs (e.g. ['ABC123', 'XYZ789']). Accepts a single string value or array of strings.

content_ids.title: Content IDs
content_ids.description: Product IDs associated with the event, such as SKUs (e.g. ['ABC123', 'XYZ789']). Accepts a single string value or array of strings.

fields.label: Content Name
fields.description: The name of the page or product associated with the event.

content_name.title: Content Name
content_name.description: The name of the page or product associated with the event.

fields.label: Content Type
fields.description: If the IDs being passed in content_ids or contents parameter are IDs of products, then the value should be product. If product group IDs are being passed, then the value should be product_group. If no content_type is provided, Meta will match the event to every item that has the same ID, independent of its type.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: If the IDs being passed in content_ids or contents parameter are IDs of products, then the value should be product. If product group IDs are being passed, then the value should be product_group. If no content_type is provided, Meta will match the event to every item that has the same ID, independent of its type.

fields.label: Contents
fields.description: A list of JSON objects that contain the product IDs associated with the event plus information about the products. ID and quantity are required fields.

contents.title: Contents
contents.description: A list of JSON objects that contain the product IDs associated with the event plus information about the products. ID and quantity are required fields.

id.title: ID
id.description: The product ID of the purchased item.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: The currency for the value specified. Currency must be a valid ISO 4217 three-digit currency code.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: The currency for the value specified. Currency must be a valid ISO 4217 three-digit currency code.

fields.label: Number of Items
fields.description: The number of items when checkout was initiated.

num_items.title: Number of Items
num_items.description: The number of items when checkout was initiated.

fields.label: Predicted LTV
fields.description: Predicted lifetime value of a subscriber as defined by the advertiser and expressed as an exact value.

predicted_ltv.title: Predicted LTV
predicted_ltv.description: Predicted lifetime value of a subscriber as defined by the advertiser and expressed as an exact value.

fields.label: Net Revenue
fields.description: The net revenue associated with the purchase.

net_revenue.title: Net Revenue
net_revenue.description: The net revenue associated with the purchase.

fields.label: Search String
fields.description: The string entered by the user for the search.

search_string.title: Search String
search_string.description: The string entered by the user for the search.

fields.label: Registration Status
fields.description: The status of the registration. true for completed registrations, false otherwise.

status.title: Registration Status
status.description: The status of the registration. true for completed registrations, false otherwise.

fields.label: Value
fields.description: A numeric value associated with this event. This could be a monetary value or a value in some other metric.

value.title: Value
value.description: A numeric value associated with this event. This could be a monetary value or a value in some other metric.

fields.label: Custom Data
fields.description: The custom data object can be used to pass custom properties.

custom_data.title: Custom Data
custom_data.description: The custom data object can be used to pass custom properties.

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: This ID can be any unique string. Event ID is used to deduplicate events sent both the server side Conversions API and the browser Pixel.

eventID.title: Event ID
eventID.description: This ID can be any unique string. Event ID is used to deduplicate events sent both the server side Conversions API and the browser Pixel.

fields.label: Event Source URL
fields.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred. Can be used to override the default URL taken from the current page.

eventSourceUrl.title: Event Source URL
eventSourceUrl.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred. Can be used to override the default URL taken from the current page.

fields.label: User Data
fields.description: User data to be sent with the event. This can include hashed identifiers like email, phone number, etc.

userData.title: User Data
userData.description: User data to be sent with the event. This can include hashed identifiers like email, phone number, etc.

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: A unique identifier for the user from your system

ph.title: Phone Number
ph.description: Phone number of the user. Make sure to include the country code. For example, "15551234567" for a US number.

ge.title: Gender
ge.description: Gender of the user. If unknown leave blank.

db.title: Date of Birth
db.description: Date of birth of the user

st.title: State
st.description: State of the user. Facebook expects the 2-letter abbreviation for US states. For example, "CA" for California, or "NY" for New York.

zp.title: ZIP/Postal Code
zp.description: ZIP or postal code of the user. For example, U.S zip code: 94035, Australia zip code: 1987, France zip code: 75018, UK zip code: m11ae.

country.title: Country
country.description: The country of the user. Facebook expects the 2-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. For example, "US" for the United States, or "GB" for the United Kingdom.

fbp.title: FBP
fbp.description: Use this field to pass the Facebook browser cookie value (_fbp) associated with the user. If the "Format User Data with Parameter Builder" setting is enabled, Segment will automatically capture this value from the _fbp cookie.

fbc.title: FBC
fbc.description: Use this field to pass The Facebook browser cookie value (_fbc) associated with the user. If the "Format User Data with Parameter Builder" setting is enabled, Segment will automatically capture this value from the _fbc cookie.
